description: Baseline measurement: cli.sh (1592 lines) + generate.sh (467 lines) = 2059 lines, 57 functions, shellcheck score 18/100

description: Comprehensive baseline: quality_score=68, 20 shellcheck issues, 3 warnings, 8 duplicate patterns, 7 tool-specific funcs

asi.optimization_approach: Phase1: Fix shellcheck warnings. Phase2: Deduplicate install patterns.

description: Fixed all 3 shellcheck warnings: removed unused variables, separated declaration/assignment

asi.hypothesis: Fixed 3 shellcheck warnings by removing unused variables and separating declaration from assignment

description: Deduplicated 8 install patterns using run_installer helper. Lines: -97, Functions: -14, Quality score: +23

description: Fixed remaining info-level shellcheck issues: SC2295, SC2162. Quality: 91→93, Issues: 9→7

description: Added cleanup trap in common.sh for better error handling. No quality score change (93)
